ValidationRule.description: Require the SGM Estimated ARR to be filled out to move Sales Process and beyond.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND ( OR(ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Joined"), ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Signed"), ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Negotiating"), ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Sales Process") ), ISBLANK( SGM_Estimated_ARR__c ), OR( ISNEW(), ISCHANGED(StageName) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: The SGM Estimated ARR is required to move this Opportunity to Sales Process or beyond.
